description: Create a shed-roof (mono-pitch) building with the following specifications in SketchUp Make 2017: Rectangular footprint of 12 meters by 8 meters, front (south) wall height of 3.0 meters, and rear (north) wall height of 4.5 meters to create a single sloped roof surface. Then, using the Skelion plugin, place solar panels flush-mounted (0 degree tilt relative to the roof) in Landscape orientation on the sloped roof face. Save the completed model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\shed_roof_solar.skp'.
